articles.title: Nvidia Chip Boosts Software Stocks Ahead of Opening
articles.description: Software stocks surged as Nvidia's new chip was announced, boosting shares of Arm, IBM, and Hewlett Packard. Investors are optimistic about the future of personal computing.

articles.title: NVIDIA DLSS 4.5 Ray Reconstruction Launching in August
articles.description: NVIDIA will release DLSS 4.5 Ray Reconstruction for all GeForce RTX GPUs in August, enhancing gaming graphics with improved AI-based denoising.
articles.impact: Enhanced graphics set to elevate gaming experience.

articles.title: Foldable iPhone Ultra Design Leaked in Video
articles.description: A hands-on video reveals the design of the upcoming foldable iPhone Ultra, showcasing a sleek 4.5mm profile.
articles.impact: Apple's foldable design sparks consumer interest.

articles.title: AMD Revives Old CPUs to Tackle RAM Costs
articles.description: AMD is reintroducing older AM4 CPUs to help gamers facing high RAM prices, making upgrades more accessible.
articles.impact: AMD's strategy eases upgrade barriers for gamers.

articles.title: AMD Unveils Radeon RX 9070 GRE and Ryzen AI Max PRO 400
articles.description: AMD announces new products including the Radeon RX 9070 GRE and Ryzen AI Max PRO 400 series during Computex 2026.
articles.impact: AMD's new products enhance competitive edge.

articles.title: Competitors Target Apple's MacBook Neo
articles.description: Dell and Microsoft are launching laptops aimed at competing with Apple's MacBook Neo, but not all are learning from Apple's strategies.

articles.title: Apple's Smart Glasses Delayed Until Late 2027
articles.description: Apple's highly anticipated smart glasses are now expected to launch in late 2027, despite being a top priority for the company.
articles.impact: Delay may impact Apple's market positioning.

articles.title: Capcom's Street Fighter 6 Update Schedule Changes
articles.description: Capcom's update schedule for Street Fighter 6 is shifting, with uncertainty surrounding the release of the Season 4 balance patch.

articles.title: Intel's Arc G3 Extreme Claims High Performance
articles.description: Intel's Arc G3 Extreme handheld platform reportedly matches Ryzen Z2 Extreme performance while consuming half the power.
articles.impact: Intel's claims could reshape market dynamics.

articles.title: AC Cobra GT Coupe Introduces Fixed Roof Design
articles.description: AC Cars unveils the AC Cobra GT Coupe, marking the first fixed roof version of the classic car in its 125-year history.
articles.impact: New design may attract classic car enthusiasts.

articles.title: Android Auto 17.0 Now Available for All Users
articles.description: Android Auto 17.0 is rolling out globally, with a method available to skip the wait for the update.
articles.impact: Update enhances user experience in vehicles.

articles.title: ASUS Teases 540Hz OLED Esports Monitor
articles.description: ASUS reveals a teaser for the ROG Strix OLED XG259QWPG Ace esports monitor, boasting a 540Hz refresh rate ahead of Computex 2026.
articles.impact: High refresh rate targets competitive gamers.

articles.title: Apple Cancels Cosmic Orange for iPhone 18 Pro
articles.description: Apple's iPhone 18 Pro will feature higher specs but will not include the Cosmic Orange color option, focusing on performance and aesthetics.
articles.impact: Color change may influence consumer choices.
